query: Can I use my discount code from the last clearance sale on the new seasonal sale?
expected_answer: Promotional discounts cannot be combined with coupon codes or other offers unless explicitly stated.

generated_answer.query: Can I use my discount code from the last clearance sale on the new seasonal sale?
generated_answer.answer: No, promotional discounts cannot be combined with coupon codes or other offers unless explicitly stated. Therefore, you cannot use your discount code from the last clearance sale on the new seasonal sale.

# Acmera Promotional Events Policy

## Types of Promotional Events

Acmera runs several types of promotional events throughout the year:

**Seasonal Sales**: Major sale events tied to festivals and holidays — Diwali Dhamaka (October/November), Republic Day Sale (January), Independence Day Sale (August), and Year-End Clearance (December). These typically run for 5-7 days.

**Flash Sales**: Short-duration sales lasting 6-24 hours, typically featuring a limited number of products at significant dis

counts (40-70% off). Flash sales are announced 24 hours in advance via app notifications and email.

**Clearance Events**: Quarterly clearance of end-of-line and overstocked products. Discounts range from 30-80%. Clearance items have limited stock and are sold on a first-come-first-served basis.

**Premium-Exclusive Sales**: Available only to Premium members. These events feature curated selections with exclusive pricing not available during general sales.

## Pricing During Promotions

All prom

query: Can you tell me how to get a refund for the laptop I bought last month?
expected_answer: Information not available in this document

generated_answer.query: Can you tell me how to get a refund for the laptop I bought last month?
generated_answer.answer:
To get a refund for your laptop, you need to initiate a return within the return window specified for your membership tier. If you are a standard member, you have a 30-day return window from the date of delivery. If you are a Premium member, you have a 60-day return window.

Once you initiate the return, the processing time for the refund will take 5-7 business days for standard members and 2 business days for Premium members. The refund will be issued to the original payment method used for the purchase. 

Please check your membership tier and ensure you are within the return window to proceed with the refund.

outside the 30-day return window by 1 day. But he says the laptop has a manufacturing defect — the trackpad clicks aren't registering. Should I push him to warranty or can we be flexible on the return?

er — it falls under warranty. Have him go through the warranty claim process. Don't apply the promotional return restrictions to genuinely defective products.

query: How do I upgrade my Acmera Premium membership to a higher tier for better benefits?
expected_answer: Information not available in this document

generated_answer.query: How do I upgrade my Acmera Premium membership to a higher tier for better benefits?
generated_answer.answer:
To upgrade your Acmera Premium membership to a higher tier, you need to meet the spending requirements for the next tier:

1. **Upgrade to Premium Silver**: You will be automatically granted this tier after spending ₹25,000 in a calendar year or maintaining an active account for 2+ years.

2. **Upgrade to Premium Gold**: You can achieve this by either spending ₹75,000 in a calendar year or maintaining Premium Silver status for 3+ consecutive years.

Once you meet the required spending or duration, your membership status will be reviewed annually on the anniversary of your enrollment, and you will be upgraded accordingly.

retrieved_chunks.content:
# Acmera Premium Membership Guide

## Overview

Acmera Premium is our loyalty program designed for frequent shoppers and long-term customers. Premium members enjoy a range of exclusive benefits across shopping, shipping, support, and account management. This guide outlines all benefits available to current Premium members.

## Membership Tiers

Acmera Premium has two tiers:

- **Premium Silver**: Automatically granted after spending ₹25,000 in a calendar year or maintaining an active account for

w do I check my Premium membership status?**
A: Go to "Account Settings" → "Membership" in the app or website. You'll see your current tier, annual spending, and the date of your next status review.

**Q: Can I share my Premium benefits with family members?**
A: Premium benefits are tied to individual accounts and cannot be shared. However, Premium Gold members can add one secondary account holder who receives Premium Silver benefits. Contact your account manager to set this up.
